title: Let’s Celebrate the 2025 Marketing Champions
author: Guilda Hilaire

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: We’re thrilled to officially announce the 2025 class ofMarketing Champions. These people have achieved expert-level product knowledge and serve as active and involved leaders in our Trailblazer Community. This group will begin a year full of career development thatamplifies their voicesand honors their contributions to help others in the Salesforce ecosystem.

sections.heading: What makes a Marketing Champion?
sections.text: All marketers are storytellers, artists, tinkerers, and scientists by nature. So what sets Marketing Champions apart? Each#MomentMarketerhas a wealth of expertise inMarketing Cloud. They’ve dedicated countless hours to improving their skills with Salesforce certifications. With this knowledge, they lead the way in their departments, bringing strategic marketing wisdom to their businesses. They’re also committed to helping others thrive in theTrailblazer Community. They pay it forward by curating educational resources on Salesforce products, sharing best practices at workshops and User Group Meetups, and mentoring the next generation of Trailblazers. If you have a question about the product you’re adopting, need advice on studying for your next certification exam, or want to brainstorm on this quarter’s big bet campaign, a Marketing Champion can help you figure it out.

sections.heading: How can I connect with the Marketing Champions?
sections.text: Marketing Champions are ready to help you and your team achieve marketing Follow Marketing Cloud onTwitterandLinkedInas we featureMarketing Championsand learn from them. See a marketer you know in our 2025 class of Marketing Champions? Share this blog on Twitter and LinkedIn to give a virtual high-five to someone you’d like to recognize! We couldn’t be more excited to introduce you to these amazing marketing experts and community leaders. Please welcome our newest class of Salesforce Marketing Champions!

existing_ctas.heading: Want to become a Marketing Champion?
existing_ctas.body: Calling all #MomentMarketers, social savants, and campaign captains — take your career to the next level by applying for Salesforce’s Marketing Champions program.

existing_ctas.heading: Ready to take the next step?
existing_ctas.body: Join our Marketing Cloud Trailblazer Community today, and you can connect with fellow marketing professionals, share your thoughts, and grow your career.

raw_html:
We’re thrilled to officially announce the 2025 class of Marketing Champions. These people have achieved expert-level product knowledge and serve as active and involved leaders in our Trailblazer Community. 

This group will begin a year full of career development that amplifies their voices and honors their contributions to help others in the Salesforce ecosystem.

What makes a Marketing Champion?

All marketers are storytellers, artists, tinkerers, and scientists by nature. So what sets Marketing Champions apart?

Each #MomentMarketer has a wealth of expertise in Marketing Cloud. They’ve dedicated countless hours to improving their skills with Salesforce certifications. With this knowledge, they lead the way in their departments, bringing strategic marketing wisdom to their businesses.

Want to become a Marketing Champion?

Calling all #MomentMarketers, social savants, and campaign captains — take your career to the next level by applying for Salesforce’s Marketing Champions program.

Apply today

They’re also committed to helping others thrive in the Trailblazer Community. They pay it forward by curating educational resources on Salesforce products, sharing best practices at workshops and User Group Meetups, and mentoring the next generation of Trailblazers.

If you have a question about the product you’re adopting, need advice on studying for your next certification exam, or want to brainstorm on this quarter’s big bet campaign, a Marketing Champion can help you figure it out.

How can I connect with the Marketing Champions?

Marketing Champions are ready to help you and your team achieve marketing Follow Marketing Cloud on Twitter and LinkedIn as we feature Marketing Champions and learn from them.

See a marketer you know in our 2025 class of Marketing Champions? Share this blog on Twitter and LinkedIn to give a virtual high-five to someone you’d like to recognize!

We couldn’t be more excited to introduce you to these amazing marketing experts and community leaders. Please welcome our newest class of Salesforce Marketing Champions!

Ready to take the next step?

Join our Marketing Cloud Trailblazer Community today, and you can connect with fellow marketing professionals, share your thoughts, and grow your career.

Here's your invite
